resources.string: Pain receptors are severed; the first chrome limb answers.

The sterile room held no place for pity. A spinal cord was opened for fiber, a trembling heart exchanged for a micro-pump, and the discarded organs were listed as biological defects. When the pain channels were severed, the patient smiled with a calm no flesh could earn. Chrome limbs caught the cold light, and the record states that the soul had finally ascended from organic constraints into lawful logic.
